highlights.text: I warned about this on October 7th, when I wrote: “Bull case tomorrow: No change.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “There is a possible entry here on a failed breakdown of today’s low at 5865”.
We flushed yesterdays 5865 lows by a couple points, trapped shorts - put in my core entry setup (the failed breakdown) to trigger longs, then rallied for 30 points to 5902+ into the close.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over two quality Failed Breakdowns we have had this week - both very textbook examples and good templates to use for those learning to spot these in real-time.

post_title: SPX Is Coiled Tight, Big Move Coming. Up, or Down? Oct 23 Plan
